signals.snippet: Hey Chris, I'm sorry to hear about the duplicate charges. I’ve flagged this with our billing team, and they will investigate and issue the refund as soon as possible. Thank you for your patience!

cause_analysis.narrative: Sinkor Beauty Salon - Hair, Spa & Beauty churned on 2026-04-10 after 211 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-12 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request. Median Zoca response time was 6.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2025-12-12 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
